title: Etsy Q2 2026 Guidance: GMS Growth Expected 3-5%
text: For the second quarter of 2026, Etsy expects GMS of $2.48 billion to $2.53 billion, representing 3% to 5% year-over-year growth for the marketplace. The company expects a take rate of about 25.7% and adjusted EBITDA margin of 27% to 29%. This guidance represents an improvement from earlier periods, incorporating stronger than expected first quarter GMS results and progress made on growth priorities. The updated outlook reflects successful execution of AI-driven marketplace improvements, including enhanced search and personalization features powered by generative AI. Mobile app contribution to GMS grew 11.2% year-over-year in Q1, with app transactions accounting for about 47% of total GMS. For full-year 2026, Etsy expects GMS growth in the low single-digit range with year-over-year growth expected in each quarter.
